aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AI citations but lacks structured content and authority signals to ensure consistent AI recommendations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
Expand on conversational content that aligns with AI search patterns.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can benefit from more frequent posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for instructional content.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency roofing services and detailed service explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for AI search recommendations.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content are consistently cited by AI models, capturing more market share.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimized for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: The Key to Unlocking More Leads
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search performance.
cta: Let's discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
